name: Security Eventlog Cleared
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Security Eventlog Cleared
SIGMA Description: One of the Windows Eventlogs has been cleared. e.g. caused by "wevtutil cl" command execution

False positives:
- Rollout of log collection agents (the setup routine often includes a reset of the local Eventlog)
- System provisioning (system reset before the golden image creation)

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (("Event ID"=517 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%security%') OR ("Event ID"=1102 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%microsoft-windows-eventlog%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Security Eventlog Cleared on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (("Event ID"=517 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%security%') OR ("Event ID"=1102 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%microsoft-windows-eventlog%')) AQL filter query
